description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden job .id-tokens which provides a VAULT_ID_TOKEN id token with audience https://vault.gitlab.net, and a hidden job .with-bundle that runs bundle install --jobs=$(nproc) --retry=3 --quiet in its before_script. Include the local CI files .gitlab/ci/secrets.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/shared-ops-vault-tokens.gitlab-ci.yml (only when $CI_SERVER_HOST == "ops.gitlab.net"), .gitlab/ci/shared-vault-tokens.gitlab-ci.yml (only when $CI_SERVER_HOST == "gitlab.com"), .gitlab/ci/protected-ops-vault-tokens.gitlab-ci.yml (only when $CI_SERVER_HOST == "ops.gitlab.net" && $CI_COMMIT_REF_PROTECTED == "true"), and .gitlab/ci/protected-vault-tokens.gitlab-ci.yml (only when $CI_SERVER_HOST == "gitlab.com" && $CI_COMMIT_REF_PROTECTED == "true").
